text: Hi, I'm Anna. A few months ago, we launched Paradigm in closed beta. Since then, we've
generated millions of data points for thousands of users. I'm excited to announce that as of today,
Paradigm is now generally available. Let me walk you through how it works.
First, start by uploading your data or asking chat for the information you need.
You can add columns with specific details, prompts, formats, types, choose from the latest models,
and click Generate to surface the information you need. Each agent is able to handle complex
multi-step reasoning, access custom tools, and leverage context from the rest of the workspace.
And this is just the beginning. Collaborate live with your team. Create shared folders,
sheets, and docs across your org. Drive impact with automated workflows, personalized emails,
and more. I'm also very excited to share that we've raised $7 million in seed funding,
led by General Catalyst. Paradigm is free to try. Give it a spin and let us know what you think.
